notes: Generator that scaffolds an Astro Starlight docs site into any target repo, faithful to .reference/canon.md. DECISIONS: deliverable = canonical tool authored in THIS repo (skills/ or commands/), registered in tools.manifest.json, emitted to all 5 agent targets via bun run build, like docs-helper (CON-02). Invoked by an engineer through their coding agent; interview is conversational (CON-03). MVP = EVERYTHING in canon at P0 (all 7 areas: detect+interview, core site, 3 content modes, diagrams, 3 deploy targets GH Pages/Vercel/static+Netlify, drift guard, idempotent re-run). Re-run = never-clobber, manifest-driven merge, preserve hand-edited pages (REQ-RERUN-02). Success bar = emitted build MUST go green as smoke test (REQ-VERIFY-01). Unsupported repo = degrade gracefully w/ flagged assumptions, hard-fail only when impossible (REQ-DETECT-02). Single manifest feeds sidebar+symlinker+drift check = strong default w/ documented escape hatch (REQ-CONTENT-03, OQ-2). Versions = ALWAYS LATEST Astro/Starlight at scaffold time (REQ-REL-02, trade-off in OQ-1). Safety = writes only within target repo, symlinks confined to repo, no external transmission (REQ-SEC-01..03). DEPENDENCY: diagram capability delegates to a SEPARATE sibling tool, the `diagram-generator` skill (text-to-diagram, authored in this repo) per REQ-DIAG-02 / CON-05; its invocation contract per REQ-DIAG-03. SEQUENCING (v2): diagram-generator is a HARD PREREQUISITE implemented BEFORE doc-site-plugin; diagram component builds against the RELEASED diagram-generator contract; build smoke test (REQ-VERIFY-01) exercises real diagram generation end-to-end (REQ-DIAG-03). OQ-4 now RESOLVED (contract is a shipped artifact, see diagram-generator spec). OUT OF SCOPE: non-Astro/Starlight generators, authoring docs content, deploying/hosting, ongoing maintenance/auto-upgrade. TECH-SPEC (v1) DECISIONS: authored as a SKILL via existing agent-agnostic-scaffold emitter (NO src/ emitter changes, purely additive: skills/doc-site-plugin/ + tools.manifest.json entry). (1) Template assets + {{TOKEN}} substitution = keystone for REQ-PORT-02 (scaffold output byte-identical across agents; agent does mechanical fill, never authors content). (2) docs.manifest.json + committed docs.manifest.schema.json (authored here via schema-gen) drives sidebar+symlinker+drift. (3) Emitted runtime scripts: POSIX sh setup-docs.sh + single node/bun check-docs.mjs. (4) Diagram = VENDOR diagram-render.mjs into target repo, pinned to CONTRACT_VERSION 1.0.0. (5) Renderer obtained by COPYING from sibling diagram-generator skill in same adapter bundle at scaffold time (single source of truth, no duplicate). (6) Never-clobber via .doc-site-scaffold.json content-hash provenance: skip+flag on user edits, native pages never tracked for overwrite (OQ-3 resolved). (7) In-repo verification = golden emission snapshots (5 targets) + template-asset/token validation + scaffold-output golden fixtures (smoke test runs in TARGET repo, not agent-docs CI). (8) Versions: latest at first scaffold, preserve pins on re-run, opt-in pin-to-known-good fallback (OQ-1 resolved). (9) Escape hatch = per-page unmanaged:true, exempt from sidebar<->manifest parity only, links+frontmatter still checked (OQ-2 resolved). (10) Lean SKILL.md + per-component reference docs; component-gated emission (decline all optional => zero files, REQ-USE-01). CARRY-FORWARD to forge-3-specs: verify EXACT per-target owned-script path where diagram-render.mjs lands in copilot/cursor bundles vs claude/codex/gemini, so diagrams.md tells the agent the correct sibling path per agent. NEXT: create PRD for diagram-generator sibling feature (already complete).
